subject: [PATCH 2/7 v2] mm/page_counter: use page_counter_stock in page_counter_try_charge

2026-05-22.patch_summary: This patch updates the page_counter_try_charge function to use the page_counter_stock feature when available. It first checks if there is enough stock to fulfill the charge request, and if so, charges it directly from the stock without hierarchical charging. If not, it attempts a greedy hierarchical charge, and if successful, tries to add any surplus pages to the stock. The patch preserves the existing semantics of the stock handling logic in try_charge_memcg.
